name: Ewedu

ingredients.item: [approx. 50g] fresh or frozen ewedu leaves (washed and drained)

method: Place the ewedu leaves, water and iru in a blender and blend for 1-2 minutes until the ewedu has broken down into very tiny pieces.
Pour the ewedu into a pot and season with salt to taste. Cook for 2-3 minutes on high heat until it starts bubbling then take oﬀ the heat immediately.
